---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S-00:00')`"
description: Publications
draft: false
keywords:
- publications
stylesheet: post.css
title: Publications
---

<a href="https://pelagicpublishing.com/products/an-introduction-to-spatial-data-analysis?variant=31129275498601" target="_blank">![An Introduction to Spatial Data Analysis](/img/publications.jpg)</a>
<figcaption>*"An Introduction to Spatial Data Analysis" helps beginners getting started working with spatial data in QGIS and R.*</figcaption>

Carlson, L., Müller, J., Ammer, C., Bässler, C., Bevanda, M., Biedermann, P. H. W., Bradler, P. M., Castañeda-Gómez, A. J., Delory, B. M., Dittrich, S., Dyson, B. L., Fichtner, A., Mitesser, O., von Oheimb, G., Pflumm, L., Pierick, K., Rothacher, J., Scherer-Lorenzen, M., **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**, Wegmann, M., Wild, C., Schmitt, T. (2026). [The invisible heterogeneity of forests — β-diversity of volatiles](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10980-026-02323-0). *Landscape Ecology, 41(4), 62.* https://doi.org/10.1007/s10980-026-02323-0

Mitesser, O., Cadotte, M. W., Mori, A. S., van der Plas, F., Chao, A., Rothacher, J., Bässler, C., Bevanda, M., Biedermann, P. H. W., Bradler, P., Castañeda-Gómez, A., Decker, O., Delory, B. M., Dittrich, S., Feldhaar, H., Fichtner, A., Kreis, A., Köstler-Albert, L., Lettenmaier, L., von Oheimb, G., Pflumm, L., Pierick, K., **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**, Thorn, S., Vogelfänger, L., Weisser, W., Wegmann, M., Wild, C., Müller, J. (2026). [Forest Heterogeneity by Chain Saw: How Between-Patch Variation in Old Growth Attributes Changes the Metacommunities of Beetles.](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/ele.70355) *Ecology Letters 2026; 29, no. 3: e70355.* https://doi.org/10.1111/ele.70355

Müller, K., Sonntag, L., Bevanda, M., Castañeda-Gomezm A. J., Wegmann, M., Wigley, B., Coetsee, C., Klein, D., Dech, S., **Schwalb-Willmann, J.** (2026). [Automized segmentation of animal paths in UAS imagery using deep learning - a case study from the Kruger National Park.](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecoinf.2025.103570) *Ecological Informatics 2026; 93: 103570.* https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecoinf.2025.103570

**Schwalb-Willmann, J.**, Castañeda-Gómez, A. J., Rauth, E., Buchelt, S., Jäger, L., Seitz, R., Pflumm, L., Klein, D., Dech, S., Ullmann, T., Wegmann, M., Lang, S., Beumer, L., & Bevanda, M. (2025). *[Potential of UAV-derived high-resolution snow depth mapping to advance arctic ecological research on Svalbard](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.22712.00002)* [Conference poster]. GfÖ Annual Meeting, 1st to 5th of September 2025, Würzburg, Germany. https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.22712.00002

Castañeda-Gómez, A. J., **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**, Klein, D., Dech, S., Wegmann, M., Müller, J., Ullmann, T., & Bevanda, M. (2025). *Assessing multispectral data comparability between sentinel-2 and UAS imagery in the context of forest monitoring* [Conference poster]. ESA Living Planet Symposium, 23st to 27th of June 2025, Vienna, Austria.

Müller, K.; **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**; Wegmann, M.; & Leutner, B. (2025). *[RStoolbox: An R Package for Remote Sensing Data Analysis](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.29464.46083)* [Conference poster]. ESA Living Planet Symposium, 23st to 27th of June 2025, Vienna, Austria. https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.29464.46083

Müller, K., Sonntag, L., Bevanda, M., Castañeda-Gómez, A. J., Wegmann, M., Wigley, B., Coetsee, C., Klein, D., Dech, S., & **Schwalb-Willmann, J.** (2025). *[From Pixels to Paths: Animal Path Mapping using UAVs and a Deep Convolutional Neural Network—Insights from the Kruger National Park](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.34141.47840)* [Conference poster]. ESA Living Planet Symposium, 23st to 27th of June 2025, Vienna, Austria. https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.34141.47840

Müller, K.; **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**; Wegmann, M.; & Leutner, B. (2025). [RStoolbox: An R package for remote sensing data analysis](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.14451). *Methods Ecol Evol. 2025; 16: 486-495.* https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.14451

Friedrich, C., Löw, J., Otte, I., Hill, S., Förtsch, S., **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**, Gessner, U., Schierghofer, C., Truckenbrodt, S., Schonert, E., Piernicke, T., Assmann, D., Conrad, C., & Thiel, M. (2024). [A multi-talented datacube: integrating, processing and presenting big geodata for the agricultural end user](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/378635392_A_multi-talented_datacube_integrating_processing_and_presenting_big_geodata_for_the_agricultural_end_user). *Informatik in der Land-, Forst und Ernährungswirtschaft. Fokus: Biodiversität fördern durch digitale Landwirtschaft.*, 251–256. https://dl.gi.de/handle/20.500.12116/43882

Wegmann, M.; **Schwalb-Willmann, J.**; Dech, S. (2020). [An Introduction to Spatial Data Analysis: Remote Sensing and GIS with Open Source Software](https://pelagicpublishing.com/products/an-introduction-to-spatial-data-analysis?variant=31129275498601). Exeter, UK. *Pelagic Publishing*. ISBN: 9781784272135.

**Schwalb-Willmann, J.**; Remelgado, R.; Safi, K.; Wegmann, M. (2020). [moveVis: Animating movement trajectories in synchronicity with static or temporally dynamic environmental data in R.](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.13374) *Methods Ecol Evol. 2020; 11: 664–669.* https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.13374
